name: AppCompat / Shim Database (Application Compatibility)
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Application compatibility shim configuration — Custom and InstalledSDB record custom shim databases applied to executables; Layers records compatibility mode flags per executable.
forensic_value: Custom SDB shims are a powerful persistence mechanism — a custom shim database can hook arbitrary API calls in any application, injecting malicious code on every execution. InstalledSDB with an unexpected GUID pointing to an unusual path is a high-confidence IOC. Layers entries (run as XP, disable DEP) can reveal attempts to bypass memory protections.
